purpose: Fallbacks the Academy 1198 context builder must not use because they caused old scene errors.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not insert Akira into scene_ids or loaded_characters just because the active list is empty.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Return diagnostic: active character selection failed.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not load Haru/Raiden/Kir/Kiara full cards only because they are scheduled later today.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Keep them reference-only until location/time/beat makes them present.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not replace full character files with a short personality summary.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Load main/character and memory if present for selected characters.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not use hidden past, hidden-bond, or future canon to drive dialogue, narration or reaction unless explicit trigger allows it.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Keep hidden fact out of context and add it to forbidden_context.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not load all relationship pairs for POV or all pairs connected to Akira.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Load only pairs relevant to current scene.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not treat calendar/canon notes as something a character knows.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Convert only visible, sourced facts into knowledge_boundary.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not let NPCs know names, roles, relationships or hidden status without source in loaded knowledge/memory/scene.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Put missing source facts into unknown/must_not_assume.

forbidden_fallbacks.rule: Do not make a character physically arrive because they are important to plot.
forbidden_fallbacks.correct_behavior: Arrival requires calendar, location, message, order, route, prior motion, or direct scene trigger.
